_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide timely detection, identification, and alerting of possible attacks/intrusions, anomalous activities, and misuse activities and distinguish these incidents and events from benign activities.
reference_document_element_description: Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost, and security events, with defined escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.523), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.503).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [alerting, events]. DCWF-only terms [activities, anomalous, attacks, benign, detection, distinguish] vs WIDAI-only terms [availability, cost, defined, escalation, implement, monitoring] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.862, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Provide timely detection, identification, and alerting of possible attacks/intru" and "Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.586 ≈ STS 0.547 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [alerting, events] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [alerting, events]. DCWF-only: [activities, anomalous, attacks, benign, detection, distinguish]. WIDAI-only: [availability, cost, defined, escalation, implement, monitoring].

signals.detail: STS 0.547 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
